homeAbout.description: Founded in 2017, Nissin Art Academy is one of Japan’s first institutions specializing in art education and advancement for international students, built on a foundation of expertise, dedication, and focus. Our core faculty team brings over 10 years of experience in supporting international students in achieving their academic goals. Education requires time and commitment, and we hope to utilize our years of experience to help each student reach their potential.

universities.name:
Japan’s Top
Art Universities
+ Prestigious Western
Art Schools
universities.description: Tokyo University of the Arts, Musashino Art University, and Tama Art University are known as the 'Big Three' of Japanese art universities, holding a similar status to China’s top three art schools.

universities.name:
Tokyo Five
Art Universities
universities.description: This group, known as the 'Tokyo Five,' includes Tama Art University, Musashino Art University, Tokyo Zokei University, Joshibi University of Art and Design, and Nihon University College of Art, all located in bustling Tokyo.

universities.name:
Kansai Four
Art Universities
universities.description: The 'Kansai Four' includes Kyoto University of Art and Design, Kyoto Seika University, Osaka University of Arts, and Seian University of Art and Design, situated in the scenic Kansai region.

universities.name:
Renowned National and
Public Universities
universities.description: Japan’s national and public universities are known for their rigorous standards and lower tuition, making them highly sought-after yet competitive for international students. These include institutions such as Hitotsubashi University, University of Tsukuba, Shizuoka University, and Kyoto City University of Arts.

universities.name:
Top Private Universities
Waseda, Keio, and GMARCH
universities.description: Waseda University and Keio University are renowned private universities, while GMARCH refers to Gakushuin University, Meiji University, Aoyama Gakuin University, Rikkyo University, Chuo University, and Hosei University, all known for their high academic standards.

universities.name:
Top Fashion Schools
in Japan
universities.description: Specialized in fashion, schools like Bunka Fashion College, Bunka Gakuen University, and BFGU are highly respected institutions in the global fashion industry.

aboutUs.title: About NISSIN Art Academy
messageText: Established in 2017, NISSIN Art Academy is one of Japan's first institutions dedicated to providing focused, specialized art admissions guidance for international students.
Our core teaching team has over 10 years of experience in assisting students with admissions, using our accumulated expertise to support each student’s journey toward their goals.

Since our founding, we have helped over 500 students gain acceptance to prestigious Japanese art universities. Over the past eight years, our students have grown from high school and university students into professionals, becoming integral members of their companies, distinguished designers, successful entrepreneurs, and even university lecturers.

We are honored to share in their joys and challenges, witnessing their growth along the path to fulfilling their artistic dreams. Meeting students during such pivotal times in their lives and helping shape their paths has deep meaning for us.
We cherish every encounter and extend our heartfelt thanks to those we have met and those we have yet to meet.
aboutUs.coreAdvantagesTitle: Five Key Reasons to Choose NISSIN Art Academy

coreAdvantagesItems.description: At NISSIN Art Academy, our faculty includes Japanese and Chinese instructors from top art universities in Japan, many of whom hold teaching positions at renowned art institutions. This provides students with highly professional guidance in art education.

With campuses in Guangzhou and Tokyo, students can begin in-person courses before arriving in Japan. Upon arrival, their progress is seamlessly transferred to the Tokyo campus, allowing them to efficiently continue their studies and exam preparation.

NISSIN Art Academy provides customized educational support. Students can freely select instructors for specialized courses and receive guidance on essays and Japanese, ensuring comprehensive coverage for successful admissions.
From pre-departure to post-study support, we provide consistent, reliable assistance, offering students and their families peace of mind on their study abroad journey.
Recognizing the importance of experience, we have developed original textbooks with our core teaching team, ensuring a stable foundation of high-quality education for our students.

philosophyText: Our mission is to guide each student toward becoming an internationally-minded artist, transforming from imitation to creation, dependency to independence, passive learning to active inquiry, and local to global perspectives.
We aim to provide a platform for future art leaders with open, international perspectives and to build a global art community.
Members of this community embody Diversity, Professionalism, Excellence, Respect, and Creativity, collaborating to make meaningful contributions to the art world’s exchange and development.

philosophyValues.subtitle: Diversity
philosophyValues.description: We value and embrace the diversity brought by different cultural backgrounds and personal qualities, encouraging every teacher and student to express their uniqueness.

philosophyValues.subtitle: Excellence
philosophyValues.description: We are committed to providing high-level education services, implementing long-term improvements to foster new ideas and reliability.

philosophyValues.subtitle: Creativity
philosophyValues.description: We see creativity as the core of art education and strive to create opportunities to foster creative talent and critical thinking.

philosophyValues.subtitle: Professionalism
philosophyValues.description: We pursue professionalism in both art and art education, demonstrating commitment and dedication in our roles.

philosophyValues.subtitle: Respect
philosophyValues.description: We respect each individual and work to create an equitable, friendly, and value-centered educational environment.

results.interviewsIntro: For over eight years, we have watched our students soar. Since our founding, we have helped over 500 students achieve admissions to top art universities across Japan. This is the starting point for greater achievements.

join.instruction: Fill out the job application form, or send your resume and related documents to wingphoenix@hotmail.co.jp.

team.title: Faculty
team.description: Established in 2017, NISSIN Art Academy is dedicated to providing high-quality, comprehensive support for students aspiring to pursue art studies in Japan. With a focus on professionalism, dedication, and expertise, our core teaching team brings over a decade of experience in guiding international students on their journey to top art schools. We believe that quality education requires time and experience, and we aim to use our years of expertise to help each student reach further and achieve their artistic dreams.

schedule.TitleText:
At NISSIN Art Academy, we provide a comprehensive and well-structured curriculum delivered by a highly experienced teaching team dedicated to offering expert artistic guidance. We also offer specialized Japanese language courses tailored for university and graduate school entrance exams.
 student receives personalized instruction designed to align with their academic goals, major, and skill level.
 Our assistant instructors, hailing from Japan's top art universities, facilitate seamless communication between students and lecturers. Additionally, we arrange professional Japanese interview coaches to conduct mock interview training, ensuring students are fully prepared for their entrance exams.

studentOriented.title: Student-centered Teaching
studentOriented.description: We prioritize one-on-one communication between teachers and students, ensuring that we fully understand each student's unique characteristics, strengths, and abilities, as well as their specific admission requirements. This enables us to create tailored academic pathways and provide personalized support for each student.

taskTeaching.title: Task-based Learning
taskTeaching.description: We tailor assignments and teaching programs based on each student's individual development direction, emphasizing the importance of improving their professional skills through practical experience in the field of art.

practiceMode.title: Extended Training
practiceMode.description: Our training focuses on reinforcing important knowledge points and core skills through repeated and advanced practice, enabling students to efficiently enhance their professional abilities in a short amount of time.

coreSkills.title: Skill Development
coreSkills.description: We strive to help our students discover and cultivate their own potential, talents, and strengths while reinforcing the core skills necessary for admission to top art institutions.

immersiveSimulation.title: Simulation
immersiveSimulation.description: Through instruction from highly qualified Japanese teachers, we create an authentic classroom atmosphere akin to that of Japan's top art universities and graduate schools. This enables students to understand and master the Japanese artistic thinking process, laying a solid foundation for successful admission to premier art institutions in Japan.

design.title: Design
design.description: Graphic Design｜Visual Communication｜Product Design｜Space Performance｜Textiles｜Environmental Design｜Architecture｜Fashion Design｜Branding｜Stage Art

drawingCourse.title: Drawing Course
drawingCourse.subtitle: Drawing course
drawingCourse.description: Japanese art universities have significantly different requirements for students’ sketching skills compared to those in other countries. Unlike in other countries, hand sketching and still life sketching are more frequently featured in the exam topics across various schools. Our sketching course will provide students with a detailed interpretation of the structure and expression of hand bones and muscles, analysis of composition, and the techniques to differentiate the textures of various objects. Through learning and training in Japan's distinctive sketching methods, we aim to strengthen students' foundational drawing skills and enhance their observational and rendering abilities regarding still life. This will enable students to quickly grasp the scoring key points of Japanese art universities, allowing them to achieve the best possible expression within the limited exam time.

visualExperimentation.title: Visual Experimentation
visualExperimentation.subtitle: Visual Experimentation
visualExperimentation.description: Visual Experimentation is a unique examination in the Image Arts and Science department at Musashino Art University. In this test, candidates use the clues provided in the exam prompt, such as specific words or phrases, to create a combination of text and visuals based on their own imaginative associations of events and scenes. The purpose of this examination is to assess students' imagination, their ability to convey situations, and their skill in integrating text and visual representation.

designCourse.title: Design Course
designCourse.subtitle: Design course
designCourse.description: Our Design Course, based on the requirements of Japanese art universities, aims to cultivate foundational knowledge in color, layout, and three-dimensional composition, utilizing traditional Japanese techniques. Tailored to each student’s desired specialization, whether in Graphic Design, Industrial Design, Architecture, or Media Studies, we offer comprehensive and skill-enhancing guidance.

interviewAndEssay.title: Guide for Interview & Essay Writing
interviewAndEssay.subtitle: Interview & Essay Writing
interviewAndEssay.description: Nissin offers specialized courses for interviews and essay writing. With the guidance of experienced teachers, students will learn professional Japanese vocabulary and participate in multiple simulation exercises to enhance their goal-oriented mindset. The program also includes training in flexible response techniques and interview etiquette to rapidly improve students' interview skills. Additionally, professional instructors will focus on developing students' thinking processes, analytical abilities, knowledge scope, and originality, enabling them to quickly enhance their essay writing skills in accordance with the requirements of Japanese art examinations.

japaneseForArtMajors.title: Art Specialized Japanese Training
japaneseForArtMajors.subtitle: Japanese Language For Art Majors
japaneseForArtMajors.description: For students aspiring to apply to top art institutions in Japan, improving their artistic skills is only part of the challenge. The Examination for Japanese University Admission for International Students (EJU) and the Japanese Language Proficiency Test (JLPT) are also significant hurdles. To help students achieve their artistic dreams and attain ideal scores in Japanese exams, we offer specialized Japanese language tutoring focused on exam preparation, effectively enhancing their language abilities and helping them overcome linguistic challenges.

researchPlan.title: Research Plan
researchPlan.description: The academy will arrange for experienced instructors to collect and analyze information from various universities, providing guidance on writing research proposals and sharing valuable writing experiences from predecessors. We will highlight efficient writing techniques and offer tailored professional advice based on each student's aspirations and abilities. This will help establish a clear direction for their research proposals, enabling students to produce high-quality, professional research plans quickly and effectively, so they can transition into exam preparation as soon as possible.

portfolioCreation.title: Portfolio Creation Course
portfolioCreation.description: Nissin provides professional guidance for students in creating their portfolios. This includes advice on the order of works, presentation methods, typesetting and binding, as well as writing Japanese descriptions for each piece. Tailored to the specific styles and requirements of different schools and majors, we help students craft portfolios that stand out and appeal to professors.

portfolioPublishing.title: Portfolio Publishing Course
portfolioPublishing.description: Nissin fully supports students in the creation and presentation of their works, offering comprehensive and multi-level guidance and assistance. The academy organizes visits to various art exhibitions and art universities, and our experienced instructors provide advice and support for the production of different types of works.

interviewGuidance.title: Guide for Interviews
interviewGuidance.description: Through the professional guidance of experienced instructors, Nissin teaches specialized Japanese vocabulary and conducts multiple mock interview practices to enhance students' goal-oriented awareness. We also provide flexible response techniques to improve students' interview skills in a short time.

japaneseForArtMajors.title: Japanese Language For Art Majors
japaneseForArtMajors.description: For students aspiring to apply to top art institutions in Japan, improving their artistic skills is only part of the challenge. The Examination for Japanese University Admission for International Students (EJU) and the Japanese Language Proficiency Test (JLPT) are also significant hurdles. To help students achieve their artistic dreams and attain ideal scores in Japanese exams, we offer specialized Japanese language tutoring focused on exam preparation, effectively enhancing their language abilities and helping them overcome linguistic challenges.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.guangzhouAddress: Room 1802&1803, Building B, Victoria Plaza, No. 103-1 Tiyu Xi Road, Tianhe District, Guangzhou
contact.tokyoAddress: 5th floor, 3-25-2 Sugamo, Toshima-ku, Tokyo 170-0002 A.Y Building

guangzhouTransport.1: Please take Guangzhou Metro Line 1 or Line 3 to Tiyu Xilu Station and use Exit E.
guangzhouTransport.2: After exiting, enter the 'Tianhe Yiyicheng' area and walk straight for approximately 600 meters. Follow the signs towards the 'Book Center' and take the escalator at Exit 9 to reach the surface.
guangzhouTransport.3: After reaching the surface, proceed towards Victoria Plaza. Pass 'Uniqlo' and continue straight for about 150 meters to reach Office Tower B. NISSIN Art Academy is located here. Please contact us upon arrival.

tokyoTransport.1: 3 min from JR Yamanote Line Sugamo Station
tokyoTransport.2: 3 min walk from Mita Line Sugamo Station
